channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for www.gematsu.com

item.title: EA Sports UFC 6 announced for PS5, Xbox Series
item.content:encoded:
• PS5
  • Xbox Series

Due out on June 19.

Electronic Arts has announced EA Sports UFC 6 for PlayStation 5 and Xbox Series. It will launch on June 19.

Digital pre-orders are available now in the following editions:

  • Standard Edition ($69.99 / £69.99 / €79.99 / ¥9,800)
    • A copy of the game
    • Pre-order bonus: “Iconic Moments Bundle” – Three fighter skins.
  • Ultimate Edition ($99.99 / £99.99 / €109.99 / ¥13,900)
    • A copy of the game
    • Fighter Pass: UFC Legends – Eight new fighters: two at launch making their EA Sports UFC debut, plus six fighters in future.
    • Expansion Pass – Your access to two fully-loaded expansions, which include a new mode and more. Coming winter 2026 and summer 2027, respectively.
      VIP Pass – Five fighter skins, six VIP cosmetic items, three VIP emojis, and ongoing progress boosts and rewards across the game.
    • “Rivalry Bundle” – Two fighter skins and 500 UFC points.
    • Pre-order bonus: “Iconic Moments Bundle” – Three fighter skins.
    • Pre-order bonus: Early Access – Seven days of early access to the game starting June 12.

Here is an overview of the game, via Electronic Arts:

EA Sports UFC 6 is powered by fighters. Evolved striking and motion systems bring UFC stars to life in the Octagon, while new game modes introduce immersive storytelling that makes every fight feel personal. Square up and fight your fight.

This game includes optional in-game purchases of virtual currency that can be used to acquire virtual in-game items.

More details coming soon.



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/ea-sports-ufc-6-announced-for-ps5-xbox-series
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot

item.title: Battlestar Galactica: Scattered Hopes launches May 11
item.content:encoded:
• PC

Roguelite strategy game datd.

Roguelite strategy game Battlestar Galactica: Scattered Hopes will launch for PC via Steam and GOG on May 11, publisher Dotemu and developer Alt Shift announced.

Here is an overview of the game, via Dotemu:

In Battlestar Galactica: Scattered Hopes, every decision matters as you manage your fleet in the shadow of relentless Cylon pursuit. Allocate your crew’s time wisely between critical repairs, internal conflicts and exploration, where new resources, items, and survivors may tip the balance. But danger is never far—hidden Cylons and mounting crises threaten your fleet from within.

When the Cylons strike, survival becomes your only objective.

Inspired by the franchise’s core theme of enduring against impossible odds—and the iconic escape of the 33 episode—combat is built around a simple directive: resist until you can jump.

Command your squadrons in a hybrid of real-time and tactical combat, deploying fighters from your hangars to intercept threats and protect your flagship. Balance offensive maneuvers with defensive strategies as you withstand overwhelming assaults, buying precious time to execute your next jump to safety. Each destination offers new risks and rewards, forcing difficult choices based on your fleet’s most urgent needs.

No two runs are the same. As you adapt and survive, you’ll unlock new squadrons, weapons and upgrades that expand your tactical options in future attempts. Every decision shapes the fate of your fleet as you fight to stay one step ahead of annihilation.

With the Twelve Colonies lost, survival rests on your leadership. Guide what remains of humanity across the stars in a desperate search for hope aboard the Battlestar Galactica.

So say we all.

Developed by Alt Shift, Battlestar Galactica: Scattered Hopes builds on the success of their acclaimed tactical narrative game Crying Suns, bringing the universe to life through striking, detailed artwork.

Watch a new trailer below.

Release Date Trailer



https://www.gematsu.com/2026/04/battlestar-galactica-scattered-hopes-launches-may-11
item.dc:creator: invalid@example.com (ResetEra_Newsbot
